tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ip route
default via 192.168.1.1 dev eth0 
192.168.1.0/24 dev eth0 proto kernel scope link src 192.168.1.3 
203.0.113.0/24 dev eth1 proto kernel scope link src 203.0.113.2 
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ls -l /etc/resolv.conf && cat /etc/resolv.conf  && ls -l /run/systemd/resolve/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null || true
-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root 0 Apr  7 17:32 /etc/resolv.conf
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
printf 'nameserver 192.168.1.1\noptions timeoutt:1 attempts:2\n' > /etc/resolv.conf && chmod 644 /etc/resolv.conf && cat /etc/reesolv.conf
nameserver 192.168.1.1
options timeout:1 attempts:2
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
python3 - <<'PY'
> from pathlib import Path
> p = Path('/etc/resolv.conf')
> p.write_text('nameserver 192.168.1.1\noptions timeout:1 attempts:2\n')
> p.chmod(0o644)
> print(p.read_text(), end='')
> PY
nameserver 192.168.1.1
options timeout:1 attempts:2
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"getent ahosts google.com | head -3 && ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo LAN_PING_OK && wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo HTTP_OK"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content: getent ahosts google.com | head -3 && ping -c 11 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo LAN_PING_OK && wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /ddev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo HTTP_OK
